Regulatory boundary

Architecture,
not advice.

This site presents software architecture, evidence surfaces, manifests, and operator tooling. It does not provide regulated advice, custody, exchange, brokerage, audit certification, or production authority.

Investment

No investment claim.

No profit promise, yield, dividend, equity, debt, ownership, buy/sell advice, investment suitability, or tokenholder right is stated or implied.

Professional services

No professional advice.

Legal, financial, tax, compliance, cybersecurity, procurement, and regulatory review must be handled by the user and their qualified advisers.

Audit

Automated assurance is not an audit opinion.

QA, factual checks, manifests, and Evidence Dockets are reproducible software artifacts. They are not a third-party audit, legal opinion, or regulated certification.

Utility boundary

AGIALPHA references are utility and canonical-identity references only. Official address: 0xA61a3B3a130a9c20768EEBF97E21515A6046a1fA. AGIALPHA is not available from MontrealAI or this website.

They are not an offer, sale, recommendation, solicitation, investment contract, securities offering, derivative, exchange service, staking product, yield product, or ownership claim.

AGIALPHA market boundary

Third-party market surfaces only.

This site does not provide token availability, primary sale, custody, redemption, brokerage, exchange, routing, price support, liquidity support, market-making, or acquisition recommendations. Users/operators are solely responsible for any third-party market interaction.

Read AGIALPHA boundary
